overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Legend of Zelda showing the character Link exploring a snowy mountain environment at night. The character walks through a snowy forest past a wooden cabin, climbs a steep rock face, and approaches ice formations and a resting wolf on the mountain summit.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain clearing with birch trees

events.description: wooden cabin enters view on the right side
passing the wooden cabin, continuing toward mountain base

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through snowy terrain toward a distant mountain, passing a small wooden cabin on the right

entered.detail: tall white-barked trees scattered across the snowy landscape
snow-covered terrain with visible grass patches
large snow-capped mountain in the background
small wooden cabin with snow-covered roof

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a snowy mountain clearing at night, with birch trees scattered across the landscape. The character walks forward through the snow, passing a small wooden cabin on the right side before continuing toward the mountain base. The sky is clear with visible stars, and the distant mountain peak looms ahead.

events.description: transition from walking on flat ground to climbing steep rock face

agents.ego_description: climbing up the steep rocky mountain face, using hands and feet to ascend

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face with patches of snow

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the snowy forest to climbing a steep rock face on the mountain. The wooden cabin and birch trees fall behind as the ascent begins. The terrain becomes rugged and vertical, with the character scaling the rocky surface under the starry night sky.

events.description: reaching the top of the ridge, transitioning from climbing to walking
large ice crystal formations become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the snowy mountain ridge toward distant ice formations

entered.detail: flat snowy ridge at the mountain summit
large translucent ice crystals jutting from the snow

segments.scene_description: After climbing the rock face, the character reaches a wide snowy ridge at the mountain summit. The terrain opens up with full sky visibility, and large ice crystal formations become visible in the distance ahead. The character walks steadily across the snow toward these formations.

events.description: wolf spotted lying down near the ice formations

agents.ego_description: approaching large ice crystals and observing a resting wolf nearby

notable_agents.action: wolf lying down on the snow near the ice formations, appearing to rest

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the large ice crystal formations at the mountain summit. A wolf is spotted lying on the snow near the crystals, resting peacefully. The character continues walking closer to both the ice formations and the wolf, with the crystals growing larger in the frame as the distance closes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a quiet snowy forest at the base of a mountain up to its crystalline summit under a starry night sky. It begins in a clearing scattered with birch trees, moving past a small wooden cabin as the character heads toward the looming mountain peak. As the forest thins, the camera transitions from the flat snow to a rugged, vertical ascent, scaling a steep rock face while the trees and cabin fall away behind. The scene then opens onto a wide snowy ridge at the summit, where the terrain levels out to reveal massive ice crystal formations in the distance. Finally, the camera closes in on these glowing crystals, approaching a wolf resting peacefully in the snow as the ice structures grow larger in the frame.
